name: Curried Vegetable Soup (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine peas, turmeric and 4 cups water. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until peas are tender, about 1 hour. Drain excess liquid.
3. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium heat (you may need up to 2 tablespoons more). Add curry powder and cook for 30 seconds.
4. Add onion, carrot, and celery; cook for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in peas, remaining water, tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Cook, covered, for 10 minutes.
6. Transfer half the mixture to a food processor or blender and puree. Return purée to soup.
7. Chill before serving. Garnish with cilantro if desired.
This soup freezes well.
